meta.divideDescription: Fristående akustiska avdelare med magnetisk modulär anslutning. Flexibel rumshantering, tvåsidig absorption.
meta.rwoodGrooveDescription: Premium ribbade akustikpaneler med FSC-certifierat träfaner på återvunnen filtkärna. Klass A absorption.
meta.rwoodPerfTitle: rWood Perf Perforerade Akustiska Träpaneler | Re-Sound

meta.rwoodMicroTitle: rWood Micro Mikro-Perforerade Akustiska Träpaneler | Re-Sound
meta.rwoodMicroDescription: Precisions mikro-perforerade akustiska träpaneler. Dubbel absorptionsmekanism, högsta brandsäkerhet.
meta.rwoodVeneerDescription: Glatta träfaner akustikpaneler. 10 utvalda träsorter, möbelkvalitetskonstruktion, EPD tillgänglig.

meta.rpetPanelTitle: rPET Panel Återvunna PET Akustikpaneler | Re-Sound

story.title: Från avfall till under
story.paragraph1: Re-Sound föddes ur en enkel fråga: tänk om vi kunde omvandla de berg av textilier som slängs varje år till något vackert och funktionellt?
story.paragraph2: Grundat i Belgien 2021 satte vi oss för att skapa akustikpaneler som presterar lika bra som traditionella material och är 100% cirkulära.
story.paragraph3: Idag har vi omdirigerat ton textilier från deponier och skapat akustiklösningar för hundratals projekt över hela Europa.

q1.question: What is your lead time?
q1.answer: Standard orders ship within 2-3 weeks. Custom colors and sizes may require 4-6 weeks.

q2.question: Do you ship internationally?
q2.answer: Yes! We ship throughout Europe. Contact us for shipping quotes outside the EU.

q3.question: Can I get samples?
q3.answer: Absolutely. We offer free sample kits with material swatches and color options.

blog.title: Blogg och nyheter
blog.subtitle: Thoughts on acoustics, sustainability, and design from our team.

circular-economy-acoustics.title: The Circular Economy: A New Era for Acoustic Solutions
circular-economy-acoustics.excerpt: How circular design principles are transforming the acoustic panel industry and why it matters for the future.

content.intro: The acoustic panel industry is undergoing a fundamental transformation. Traditional linear models—take, make, dispose—are giving way to circular approaches that keep materials in use indefinitely.

section1.title: Why Circularity Matters
section1.text: Every year, millions of tons of acoustic materials end up in landfills. These materials, often containing synthetic fibers and adhesives, can take centuries to decompose. The circular economy offers an alternative: designing products that can be continuously recycled.

section2.title: Our Approach
section2.text: At Re-Sound, we've designed our panels from the ground up for circularity. Using only recycled textiles and bio-based binders, our panels can be fully recycled at end of life—becoming new panels rather than waste.

content.quote: The best acoustic panel is one that never becomes waste.

section3.title: The Business Case
section3.text: Circular design isn't just good for the environment—it's good business. By creating value from waste and offering take-back programs, we build stronger relationships with customers while reducing material costs.

conclusion.title: Looking Forward
conclusion.text: The transition to circular acoustics is just beginning. As more companies adopt these principles, we'll see an industry transformed—one where acoustic comfort and environmental responsibility go hand in hand.

office-acoustic-solutions.title: Creating the Perfect Acoustic Environment in Modern Offices
office-acoustic-solutions.excerpt: Practical tips for improving acoustics in open-plan offices, meeting rooms, and collaborative spaces.

content.intro: Open-plan offices present unique acoustic challenges. Without proper treatment, noise levels can reduce productivity by up to 66%. Here's how to create a balanced acoustic environment.

section1.title: Understanding Office Acoustics
section1.text: Sound in offices comes from multiple sources: speech, equipment, HVAC systems, and external noise. Effective acoustic design addresses all these elements.

section2.title: Strategic Panel Placement
section2.text: Not all surfaces need treatment. Focus on ceiling areas above workstations, walls between collaborative and focused zones, and dividers between desks.

content.quote: Good acoustics is invisible—you only notice when it's missing.

section3.title: Balancing Absorption and Reflection
section3.text: Complete absorption creates an unnaturally 'dead' space. The goal is reducing reverberation while maintaining some natural ambience.

conclusion.title: Start Small, Measure Results
conclusion.text: Begin with high-impact areas and measure the difference. Often, strategic placement of a few panels can transform a space.

recycled-materials-quality.title: Recycled Materials: Meeting and Exceeding Quality Standards
recycled-materials-quality.excerpt: How we ensure our recycled textile panels match or exceed the performance of traditional materials.

content.intro: There's a persistent myth that recycled materials mean compromised quality. Our panels prove the opposite—recycled can mean superior.

section1.title: Rigorous Material Selection
section1.text: Not all recycled textiles are suitable for acoustic panels. We carefully select and sort materials to ensure consistent fiber quality and acoustic performance.

section2.title: Advanced Processing
section2.text: Our proprietary processing transforms mixed textiles into uniform acoustic fiber. This consistency is key to achieving predictable, high-performance results.

content.quote: Sustainability and quality aren't trade-offs—they're complements.

section3.title: Third-Party Testing
section3.text: Every batch undergoes acoustic testing to EN ISO 354 standards. We achieve Class A absorption ratings consistently, meeting the same standards as virgin material panels.

conclusion.title: The Future is Recycled
conclusion.text: As processing technology improves, recycled materials will increasingly outperform virgin alternatives. The question isn't whether to use recycled—it's how quickly we can scale.

sound-absorption-explained.title: Sound Absorption Explained: A Guide for Architects
sound-absorption-explained.excerpt: Everything you need to know about sound absorption coefficients and selecting the right panels.

content.intro: Understanding acoustic specifications can be challenging. This guide breaks down the key metrics and what they mean for your project.

section1.title: The αw Coefficient
section1.text: The weighted sound absorption coefficient (αw) is the most common metric. It ranges from 0 (no absorption) to 1 (complete absorption). Our panels achieve αw 0.95-1.00.

section2.title: Frequency Considerations
section2.text: Different materials absorb different frequencies. Porous materials like ours excel at mid and high frequencies—the speech range—making them ideal for offices.

content.quote: The right absorption depends on the room's purpose.

section3.title: Coverage Calculations
section3.text: More isn't always better. The ideal coverage depends on room volume, surface materials, and intended use. We offer free acoustic consultations to help specify correctly.

conclusion.title: Beyond the Numbers
conclusion.text: While specifications matter, the best acoustic design considers the whole experience. Aesthetics, sustainability, and wellbeing all contribute to successful spaces.

hero.title: Interior

overview.description: Re-Sound Interior är en komplett akustisk förbättringslösning. Varje startpaket inkluderar den akustiska kärnan, tygklädsel och monteringsbeslag.

features.title: Cirkulär invändigt, vacker utvändigt

modular.title: Modulär mångsidighet

maintenance.title: Enkel underhåll

acoustics.title: Överlägsen ljudabsorption
acoustics.description: Med en viktad ljudabsorptionskoefficient (αw) på 1,0 levererar Re-Sound Interior maximal akustisk prestanda.

installation.title: Ubesværet installation
installation.description: Vårt bekväma krokmontagesystem gör installation enkel. Inga specialverktyg, inga komplexa procedurer—bara snabba, rena resultat.

maintenance.title: Alltid fräscht utseende
maintenance.description: Det avtagbara överdragets gör städningen enkel. Ta bara av det, tvätta och sätt tillbaka—dina Solid paneler ser alltid perfekta ut.

acoustics.title: Högpresterande ljudabsorption

hero.title: Divide
hero.tagline: Klicka för att omdefiniera, dela för stilen
hero.description: Meet Re-Sound Divide—the first freestanding acoustic screen designed for flexible use.

overview.title: Redefine Your Space
overview.description: Re-Sound Divide är den första fristående akustiska produkten designad för ultimat flexibilitet. Skapa rumsavdelningar, privatzoner eller unika konfigurationer.

base.title: Integrerad bas
base.description: Tack vare den integrerade basen är Divide alltid stabil och står fritt på vilket golv som helst. Den lätta konstruktionen gör det enkelt att flytta och omplacera.
base.feature1: Stabil på enhver overflade uden fastgørelse

modular.title: Modulärt system
modular.description: Bestäm själv layouten för ditt utrymme. Divide är ett modulärt system som anpassar sig efter dina behov. Oavsett om det är en rak, L-formad eller U-formad konfiguration.

features.title: Cirkulär av design
features.description: Som alla Re-Sound produkter är Divide noggrant designad med cirkularitet som kärna. Tillverkad av återvunna material.

hero.title: rPET - Groove

overview.title: Cirkulär Tystnad
overview.description: rPET - Groove panels bring a contemporary touch to any space while reducing noise disturbances. The visible slat design creates visual depth and texture, perfect for modern offices, meeting rooms, lobbies, restaurants, and reception areas.

overview.feature4: Tillgänglig i tjocklekarna 12 mm, 24 mm och 36 mm

fromBottles.title: Från plastflaska till akustikpanel
fromBottles.step1Desc: Post-consumer plastic bottles are collected and sorted
fromBottles.step2Desc: Bottles are cleaned, shredded, and melted into PET fibers
fromBottles.step3Desc: Fibers are compressed into dense acoustic felt sheets
fromBottles.step4Desc: CNC precision cutting creates the signature groove patterns
fromBottles.description: Each rPET - Groove panel gives new life to approximately 60 recycled plastic bottles. Our manufacturing process transforms post-consumer PET waste into high-performance acoustic felt, creating a truly circular product.

patterns.title: Välj ditt mönster
patterns.description: Four distinctive groove patterns to match any architectural vision. From clean parallel lines to dynamic chevrons, each pattern is precision-cut using CNC technology for perfect consistency.

colors.title: 12 Levande Färger
colors.subtitle: From neutral tones to bold accents, our curated collection complements any interior.
colors.feature1Desc: Massfärgad färg falnar inte i solljus
colors.feature2Desc: Fläcktålig yta, kan torkas av med en fuktig trasa
colors.feature3Desc: Färgprocessen säkerställer konsekventa färger över hela panelen
colors.description2: From neutral tones to bold accents, our curated color palette fits seamlessly into any interior design concept. All colors are achieved through dope-dyeing, ensuring excellent color fastness and UV resistance.
colors.description: From neutral tones to bold accents, our curated color palette fits seamlessly into any interior design concept. All colors are achieved through dope-dyeing, ensuring excellent color fastness and UV resistance.

thickness.subtitle: Tre tjocklekar för olika akustiska behov

acoustics.title: Akustisk Prestanda
acoustics.description: The unique groove design combined with high-density recycled PET felt creates exceptional sound absorption. Reduce echo, eliminate noise, and create spaces that are as comfortable to the ear as they are to the eye.
acoustics.benefit1: Markant minskning av efterklang i alla utrymmen
acoustics.benefit3: Absorberar störande ljudfrekvenser för ökad komfort
acoustics.certNote: Tested according to ISO 354 & ASTM C423

installation.title: Snabb och Flexibel Installation
installation.step1Desc: Se till att väggen eller taket är rent, torrt och plant
installation.step3Desc: Tryck fast på plats och håll i 60 sekunder
installation.step4Desc: Låt härda i 24 timmar för full vidhäftning
installation.description: rPET - Groove panels are designed for quick and easy installation. Their lightweight construction means a single person can handle the panels, and multiple mounting options give you flexibility for any project.

sustainability.title: Cirkulär från Källan
sustainability.description: rPET - Groove panels embody the circular economy. Made entirely from post-consumer recycled plastic, they can be recycled again at end of life. We offer free take-back to ensure nothing goes to waste.
sustainability.badge2Desc: Gratis retur av paneler vid livslängdens slut
sustainability.badge3Desc: Tillverkad i Belgien med korta leveranskedjor

applications.title: Användningar
applications.description: rPET - Groove panels fit seamlessly into diverse environments
applications.app1Desc: Open plan workspaces, meeting rooms, focus zones

cta2.freeNote: Gratis prover tillgängliga • Tillverkad i Belgien • 100% Återvunnet

hero.title: rPET - Panel
hero.description: Transform any space with rPET - Panel acoustic panels. Made from 100% recycled PET bottles, these lightweight yet powerful sound absorbers deliver maximum acoustic performance with minimal environmental impact.

overview.title: Återvunnet PET som Bäst
overview.reason1: Lightweight panels that anyone can install without heavy equipment
overview.reason2: OEKO-TEX® certified, safe for all environments including schools and healthcare
overview.reason3: CNC cuttable, millable, drillable—use it like MDF with none of the downsides
overview.reason4: 50+ colors to complement any interior design vision
overview.reason5: Combine with rPET Groove for a complete design system
overview.description: rPET - Panel transforms recycled PET bottles into high-performance acoustic panels. Each panel diverts plastic waste from landfills while creating healthier, quieter environments. It's the sound-absorbing alternative to MDF—but at a fraction of the weight.
overview.feature1: Made from up to 50% recycled PET bottles

process.title: Designa, konstruera, bygg
process.description: rPET Panel can be processed exactly like MDF. Cut, mill, drill, bend—your fabricator will need zero new tools or techniques.

workability.step1: Precision shapes and profiles with standard CNC equipment
workability.step2: Direct fixings without pre-drilling or special anchors
workability.step3: Create curves and angles with simple V-cut technique
workability.title: Process Like MDF, Weighs Like Nothing
workability.description: rPET - Panel combines the workability of MDF with incredibly light weight. Cut it with a saw, mill it on CNC, drill it, v-cut it—the material handles beautifully with standard workshop tools.
workability.step1Desc: Manual or electric—clean cuts every time
workability.quote: You soon find out that rPET - Panel can be processed as quickly and easily as an MDF board.

acoustics.title: Maximal Absorption
acoustics.benefit1: Dramatically improve intelligibility in meeting rooms and classrooms
acoustics.benefit2: Create calmer environments that boost wellbeing and productivity
acoustics.benefit3: Reduce sound transmission between spaces for confidential conversations
acoustics.description: rPET - Panel achieves the maximum possible acoustic absorption rating. The unique fiber structure traps and dissipates sound energy, dramatically reducing reverberation and improving speech clarity.
acoustics.testConfig: Test Configuration: 24mm panel on 50mm frame with polyester wool insulation achieves αw 0.95

sustainability.title: Cirkulär i Kärnan
sustainability.badge2Desc: Full material recovery at end of life
sustainability.description: rPET - Panel embodies the circular economy. Each panel contains up to 50% recycled PET bottles, and at end of life, the entire panel can be recycled again. No waste, no compromise.

sample.title: Begär ditt provpaket
sample.description: Experience the quality of rPET - Panel firsthand. Our customized sample package includes color swatches, thickness options, and finishing samples to help you make the perfect choice.

why.description: Discover why architects, designers, and acoustic consultants choose rPET - Panel for their most demanding projects.
why.reason1: Made from recycled PET bottles, fully recyclable, and contributing to a circular economy.
why.reason2: Acoustic absorption up to αw 1.00—the highest rating possible for sound absorption.
why.reason3: Lightweight and stable. Cut, drill, mill, and install with standard tools.
why.reason4: Anti-static, skin-friendly, anti-allergenic. No VOC or formaldehyde emissions.
why.reason5: 5 standard colors plus any RAL/NCS. Add fabric, laminate, veneer, or custom prints.
why.title: Five Reasons to Choose rPET

colors.title: 5 Standardfärger + Anpassad RAL/NCS
colors.description: Choose from 5 sophisticated standard colors or specify any custom color from the RAL or NCS palette. Every shade maintains the same outstanding acoustic performance.
colors.moreOptionsDesc: All base colors can be combined with finishing layers like acoustic fabrics, HPL laminate, real wood veneer, or custom prints—without compromising acoustic performance.

applications.title: Användningar
applications.description: Every building and every room is unique. rPET - Panel adapts to any acoustic challenge with versatile applications.

cta2.freeNote: Free samples available • Made in Belgium • 100% Recyclable

hero.title: rWood - Groove
hero.description: Bring natural warmth and sophisticated style to any space with rWood - Groove acoustic panels. Premium oak and walnut veneers combined with sound-absorbing felt backing create harmony between aesthetics and acoustics.

overview.title: Där naturen möter design
overview.subtitle: Premium Finishes
overview.description: rWood - Groove panels transform any room into a sophisticated acoustic environment. The combination of precision-milled grooves and premium wood veneers creates a surface that is both visually stunning and acoustically effective.
overview.feature1: Premium A-grade oak and walnut veneers
overview.description2: rWood - Groove panels transform any room into a space of natural beauty and acoustic comfort. Each panel features premium A-grade oak or walnut veneer, precisely grooved to create the signature linear aesthetic while maximizing sound absorption through integrated felt backing.

oakCollection.title: Oak Collection
oakCollection.description: Natural oak veneer in multiple stain options, from raw blonde to deep smoked tones.

feltBacking.title: Felt Backing Options
feltBacking.description: Natural grey, black, or colored acoustic felt visible through the grooves.

acoustics.title: Överlägsen ljudabsorption
acoustics.benefit1: Control echo and improve speech clarity in any room
acoustics.description: The unique groove design combined with high-quality acoustic felt creates exceptional sound absorption. Reduce echo and reverberation to create calm, productive spaces.
acoustics.description2: The unique groove design combined with high-quality acoustic felt creates exceptional sound absorption. Reduce echo, eliminate noise, and create spaces that are as comfortable to the ear as they are to the eye.

installation.title: Seamless Installation
installation.step1Desc: Mount battens or apply adhesive to clean, dry surface
installation.step2Desc: Start from corner, ensure level alignment
installation.step3Desc: Slide tongue into groove for seamless connection
installation.step4Desc: Add end mouldings for a professional result
installation.description: rWood - Groove panels feature an innovative tongue-and-groove connection for fast and easy installation.
installation.description2: rWood - Groove panels feature an innovative tongue-and-groove connection system that ensures invisible joints and a cohesive surface. Whether you're a professional installer or a skilled DIYer, our system makes installation straightforward.

sustainability.title: Ansvarsfullt inköpt
sustainability.description: Every rWood - Groove panel is crafted with sustainability at its core. Our FSC® certified wood comes from responsibly managed forests, and the acoustic backing uses recycled materials.
sustainability.description2: Every rWood - Groove panel is crafted with sustainability at its core. Our FSC® certification guarantees that the wood comes from responsibly managed forests that provide environmental, social, and economic benefits.

accessories.title: Accessories
accessories.description: Professional finishing touches for a perfect result
accessories.item1Desc: Clean edges where panels meet other surfaces
accessories.item2Desc: Seamless internal and external corner solutions
accessories.item3Desc: Hidden fixing system for walls and ceilings
accessories.item4Desc: Matching oils for repairs and maintenance

patterns.title: Premium Finishes
patterns.description: Four distinct groove patterns to match any architectural vision. From classic batten to modern linear, each pattern transforms the wall into a dynamic surface.
patterns.description2: Four distinct groove patterns to match any architectural vision. From classic balanced proportions to bold wide strips—find the perfect expression for your space.

materials.oilFinishesDesc: Natural, White, Clear, Brown, Dark Brown, and Black oil finishes. Each penetrates deep into the wood for lasting, authentic protection.
materials.walnutDesc: Rich, warm tones with distinctive grain patterns. The premium choice for high-end interiors.
materials.description: Every rWood - Groove panel is crafted with A-grade veneer, ensuring consistent grain and colour. The oil-finished surface is ready to install with no additional treatment required.
materials.description2: Every rWood - Groove panel is crafted with A-grade veneer, ensuring consistent grain patterns and superior quality. Choose from our range of oiled and painted finishes to perfectly complement your interior design.

cta2.freeNote: Free samples available • Made in Europe • FSC® Certified

hero.title: rWood - Perf
hero.description: High-performance drilled acoustic panels combining natural wood beauty with outstanding sound absorption. A Fire Retardant Medium Density Fiberboard core and over-veneered edges deliver the highest levels of fire safety and acoustic control.
hero.description2: High-performance drilled acoustic panels combining natural wood beauty with outstanding sound absorption. A Fire Retardant Medium Density Fiberboard core and over-veneered edges deliver the highest levels of fire safety and acoustic control for demanding public spaces.

patterns.title: Välj ditt mönster
patterns.description: Four drilled perforation patterns with calibrated acoustic properties. From maximum open area for highest absorption to subtle micro-perforations for a clean wood aesthetic.
patterns.coreMatchTitle: Matcha kärnan till ditt faner för att få perforeringarna att försvinna—eller gör dem till ett designelement.
patterns.coreMatchDesc: Match the core to your veneer to make perforations blend in, or choose a contrasting core for a design statement.
patterns.description3: Four drilled perforation patterns with calibrated acoustic properties. From maximum open area for demanding acoustic spaces to more discreet patterns that prioritize visual refinement.
patterns.coreMatchDesc2: Match the core to your veneer to make perforations blend in, or choose a contrasting core for a decorative effect.

coreColor.title: Kärnfärg
coreColor.description: Svart eller naturfärgad akustisk filt synlig genom perforeringarna—subtilt men kraftfullt.

surfaces.title: Premium träytor
surfaces.natureDesc: Lively variations and characteristic expression associated with each wood species.
surfaces.geminiDesc: Even colour tone and structure for a more harmonious, uniform appearance.
surfaces.description: Every rWood - Perf panel is produced with over-veneered edges — a traditional craft technique that creates perfectly seamless joints and eliminates visible panel boundaries.
surfaces.description3: Every rWood - Perf panel is produced with over-veneered edges—a traditional manufacturing technique where solid wood edging is integrated around the panel before veneering. This gives each panel the appearance of being entirely of wood, with seamless joints across large surfaces.

acoustics.title: Designad för ljud
acoustics.benefit1: Effective across the full frequency spectrum, from low to high
acoustics.benefit2: B-s1, d0—the highest achievable class for wooden panels
acoustics.benefit3: Four perforation patterns for tailored acoustic solutions
acoustics.description: Precision-drilled perforations allow sound waves to enter the panel and pass through to the absorption layer beneath. The cavity behind the panel further enhances low-frequency absorption.
acoustics.layer2Name: Fire Retardant Medium Density Fiberboard Core
acoustics.description3: Precision-drilled perforations allow sound waves to enter the panel and pass through to the cavity behind. Combined with mineral wool insulation, rWood - Perf delivers outstanding broadband absorption across the full frequency spectrum—from low bass to high treble.

installation.title: Seamless Installation
installation.step1Desc: Install metal rails to wall or ceiling structure
installation.step2Desc: Add mineral wool in the cavity for optimal absorption
installation.step3Desc: Concealed clip system for tool-free, zero-gap mounting
installation.step4Desc: In-line perforation patterns with seamless over-veneered joints
installation.description: rWood - Perf panels are installed with a concealed clip system for an invisible, seamless look.
installation.description3: rWood - Perf panels are installed with a concealed clip system designed for precision, speed, and a flawless end result. The system ensures zero-spaced joints and perfectly aligned perforation patterns across multiple panels.

sustainability.title: Byggd för att hålla, byggd ansvarsfullt
sustainability.badge3Desc: Renewable energy sources, short supply chains
sustainability.description: rWood - Perf combines durable, natural materials with a responsible manufacturing approach.
sustainability.description3: rWood - Perf combines durable, natural materials with responsible sourcing. The fibre gypsum core is inherently low-emitting—no chemical impregnation is needed for fire performance—and our veneers come from sustainably managed forests.

specs.title: Specifikationer
specs.matCustomColor: Custom color tones with transparent or solid pigmentation
specs.matLacquerFinish: From super matte to high gloss UV-cured lacquer
specs.coreVal: Medium Density Fiberboard core (brown / green / black)

overview.description: rWood - Perf panels are one of the most effective acoustic wall solutions. Precision-drilled perforations allow sound to pass through the decorative wood surface into the highly absorbent core.
overview.feature1: Fire Retardant Medium Density Fiberboard core (B2-s1, d0)
overview.feature3: Light or dark core for pattern discretion
overview.description3: rWood - Perf panels are one of the most effective and widely used solutions for acoustic walls and ceilings. The precisely drilled round perforations create a large open area that guarantees high levels of sound absorption, while premium wood veneer ensures a natural, warm appearance.
overview.description4: Combined with a Fire Retardant Medium Density Fiberboard core and over-veneered edges for seamless joints, these panels are engineered for the highest demands in large public spaces—from atriums and concert halls to offices and schools.

accessories.title: Accessories
accessories.description: Professional finishing elements for a flawless result
accessories.item1Desc: Matching profiles for clean panel terminations
accessories.item2Desc: Seamless internal and external corner transitions

cta.note: Free samples available • Made in Europe • FSC® Certified • A2 fire rating available

hero.title: rWood - Micro
hero.description: Experience the beauty of natural wood with the acoustic performance of advanced micro-perforation technology. Virtually invisible holes deliver Class A sound absorption while preserving the pure, homogeneous look of premium wood veneer.

perforation.title: Välj din perforation
perforation.description: Different micro-perforation densities for fine-tuned acoustic control—from subtle to high-performance.

surfaces.title: Premium ytor
surfaces.woodVeneerDesc: Premium A-grade veneers in oak, walnut, birch, and more. Nature and Gemini cuts available.
surfaces.hplLaminateDesc: High-pressure laminate surfaces for extra durability. Available in a wide range of colors and finishes.
surfaces.description: Every rWood - Micro panel features over-veneered edges — a manufacturing technique that creates seamless panel joints for a continuous wood surface.
surfaces.finish1Desc: Custom color tones with transparent or solid pigmentation
surfaces.finish2Desc: From super matte to high gloss UV-cured lacquer
surfaces.description2: Every rWood - Micro panel features over-veneered edges—a manufacturing technique from traditional carpentry heritage. The result: stronger panels, seamless joints, and a continuous pattern regardless of panel format.

acoustics.title: Överlägsen ljudabsorption
acoustics.benefit1: Micro-holes and sound chambers work together for superior absorption
acoustics.benefit2: Less dependent on air gaps—thinner wall and ceiling build-ups
acoustics.benefit3: B-s1, d0 rating—the highest achievable for micro-perforated wood
acoustics.description: The combination of micro-perforations in the surface and thousands of larger sound-entry channels creates exceptional broadband absorption.
acoustics.layer2Name: Fire Retardant Medium Density Fiberboard Core
acoustics.description2: The combination of micro-perforations in the surface and thousands of larger sound chambers in the core creates a dual acoustic mechanism. Less dependent on insulation and air gaps—meaning thinner walls and ceilings that save valuable space.

installation.title: Precision Installation
installation.step1Desc: Mount aluminium rails to wall or ceiling structure
installation.step2Desc: Optional mineral wool for enhanced absorption
installation.step3Desc: Concealed clip system for tool-free panel mounting
installation.step4Desc: Over-veneered edges create continuous wood surface
installation.description: rWood - Micro panels are installed with our concealed mounting system, ensuring invisible fixings and a flawless finish. The system allows for both wall and ceiling applications, with seamless panel-to-panel transitions through over-veneered edges.

bespoke.title: Skräddarsydda möjligheter
bespoke.backlitDesc: Create stunning backlit sections where light shines through the micro-perforations. Logos and patterns glow beautifully when lit, yet remain invisible when the light is off.
bespoke.customDimDesc: Panels produced to your exact specifications. Non-standard sizes and shapes for unique architectural requirements.
bespoke.patternDesc: Over-veneered panels create seamless transitions regardless of format, for a homogeneous impression on any surface.
bespoke.description: rWood - Micro panels can be customized and pre-fabricated according to your drawings. The micro-perforations open up unique design possibilities that go beyond standard acoustic panels.

sustainability.title: Ansvarstillverkad
sustainability.badge3Desc: Manufactured in Europe, reducing transport emissions
sustainability.badge4Desc: E1-rated for healthier indoor air quality
sustainability.description: rWood - Micro panels are built with sustainability as a core principle. FSC® certified wood, low-emission finishes and responsibly sourced materials ensure environmental responsibility throughout the product lifecycle.

specs.title: Specifikationer
specs.coreVal: Medium Density Fiberboard core (brown / green / black)

overview.title: Designad för ögon och öron
overview.description1: rWood - Micro panels combine advanced micro-perforation technology with premium wood veneers. From a normal viewing distance, the perforations are completely invisible—what you see is a beautiful, homogeneous wood surface. What you hear is exceptional acoustic comfort.
overview.description2: The secret lies in the combination of two acoustic mechanisms: thousands of precisely engineered micro-holes in the surface and sound-absorbing chambers within the core material.
overview.feature1: Perforations invisible from normal viewing distance

accessories.title: Accessories
accessories.description: Professional finishing elements for a flawless result
accessories.item1Desc: Matching profiles for clean panel terminations
accessories.item2Desc: Seamless internal and external corner transitions
accessories.item4Desc: Integrated lighting for backlit panel effects

patterns.description: Four perforation densities to match your acoustic requirements. From virtually invisible micro-perforations to generous open areas, each density delivers a different balance of aesthetics and performance.
patterns.description2: Four perforation densities to match your acoustic requirements. From virtually invisible Nano perforations to maximum-absorption Micro L patterns—select the perfect balance between aesthetics and acoustic performance.

hero.title: rWood - Panel
hero.tagline: Elegansen av Äkta Trä. Redo att Använda.
hero.description: Premium fanerade MDF-paneler, borstade, betsade och lackerade — klara att installera. Tillgängliga i 10 träfanerarter och 3 ytor. Tillverkade i Belgien.

construction.title: Lagd Konstruktion
construction.layer1Desc: FSC-certified natural wood veneer, factory finished
construction.layer3Desc: Prevents warping for perfectly flat panels

veneers.title: 10 Curated Wood Veneers
veneers.description: From pale European oak to rich American walnut—each species selected for grain character, availability, and FSC certification.

finishes.title: Touch & Protection
finishes.description: The right finish brings out the best in every wood species. Our multi-layer finishing process delivers a surface that is as pleasing to touch as it is durable — protected against scratches, moisture and daily wear.
finishes.naturalOilDesc: Deep, authentic wood feel with penetrating protection.
finishes.unfinishedDesc: Ready for custom on-site finishing by the installer.

advantages.title: Nyckelfördlar
advantages.adv1: Multiple standard sizes; custom dimensions on request
advantages.adv2: Use for wall cladding, furniture, retail displays, and more

applications.title: Limitless Possibilities
applications.app1: Seamlessly match acoustic panels to fitted furniture
applications.app2: Feature walls with natural warmth and acoustic benefit
applications.app3: Premium finishes for high-footfall commercial spaces
applications.description: From bespoke cabinetry to full-height feature walls — rWood - Panel delivers the look and feel of solid timber for every interior application.
applications.app4Desc: Shop fittings, bar counters, hotel lobbies and restaurant interiors. Consistent quality across large-scale projects.
applications.app1Extra: Easy to machine with standard woodworking tools.
applications.app2Extra: Creates stunning visual impact with the warmth of natural wood.
applications.app3Extra: Lightweight slim format available for reduced structural load.

sustainability.title: Ansvarsfullt Trä
sustainability.badge1Desc: All wood from responsibly managed forests
sustainability.badge2Desc: Free end-of-life panel return and recycling
sustainability.description: Every rWood - Panel starts with responsibly sourced timber. As part of Re-Sound's circular economy commitment, we maximise the use of each log by processing it as veneer — yielding up to 40× more surface area than solid lumber from the same tree.
sustainability.badge3Desc: Short supply chains, reduced transport emissions
sustainability.badge5Desc: E1 classified, meets strictest emission standards
sustainability.badge6Desc: Production powered by renewable energy sources

related.title: Relaterade Produkter
related.item3Desc: Order physical veneer samples to compare finishes, colours and textures in your space

overview.title: Naturligt Trä, Premium Yta
overview.description: rWood - Panel förmedlar värmen och karaktären hos massivt trä i ett förfinerat, klart att använda format. Varje panel är tillverkad av premium A-grad faner, limmad på en högdensitets MDF-kärna med avancerad pressteknik.
overview.feature1: Äkta A-grad träfaner på högdensitets MDF-kärna
overview.feature2: Förfiniserad med 6 lager UV-akryllack — ingen ytterligare behandling behövs
overview.feature3: 10 fanerarter tillgängliga — ek, valnöt, björk och mer
overview.feature4: FSC® certifierad — trä från ansvarsfullt förvaltade skogar
overview.feature5: Tillgänglig i naturlack, naturolja eller obehandlad

anatomy.layer1Desc: A-grade real wood veneer, brushed, stained and protected with 6 layers of UV-cured acrylate urethane lacquer. Soft-touch super matt finish.
anatomy.layer2Desc: 700 kg/m³ FSC® certified MDF. Available in standard, moisture-resistant (MR) and fire-retardant (FR) grades.
anatomy.layer3Desc: Matching veneer backing ensures dimensional stability and prevents warping. Finished or unfinished options.
anatomy.description: Every layer serves a purpose — from the authentic wood surface to the engineered core.

collection.title: 10 Curated Wood Veneers
collection.description: From serene Scandinavian birch to dramatic American walnut — every veneer is carefully selected, brushed and finished to showcase the character of the wood.
collection.customNote: Custom veneer species and stain colours available on project orders of 50+ panels.

dimensions.title: Panelformat
dimensions.description: Three formats to cover every application — from full-height wall cladding to compact furniture elements.

accessories.title: Matchande produkter och tillbehör
accessories.item3Desc: Request samples of any veneer and finish combination.

cta.title: Redo att Lyfta ditt Projekt?
cta.description: Få en skräddarsydd offert, begär fysiska prover eller tala med vårt specifikationsteam om ditt nästa projekt.

hero.title: rPET Flex-Groove
hero.description: The ultimate acoustic solution for curved surfaces. Made from recycled PET felt with precision V-cut grooves, these flexible panels adapt seamlessly to columns, curved walls, and any architectural form with a minimum radius of 500mm.

overview.title: Designad för böjda ytor
overview.description: Flex-Groove panels provide a versatile acoustic solution for curved surfaces, effortlessly adapting to any shape. Suitable for inner and outer radii, their flexible structure allows for seamless transitions along walls, columns, and other rounded architectural elements.
overview.feature2: Works with inner and outer radii
overview.feature3: Ribbed texture adds depth and rhythm

technology.title: V-Cut Flexibilitetssystem
technology.description: Each panel is incised with precision V-cuts, allowing it to bend without breaking. This smart cut creates the signature ribbed texture — a series of linear grooves that enable flexibility while giving the surface a sculptural relief.
technology.feature2Desc: Smooth transitions on any curved surface

colors.title: 12 Curated Colors
colors.description: Our carefully curated color palette offers versatile options for any interior. From soft neutrals to bold statement colors, each shade is designed to complement modern architectural spaces while providing excellent acoustic performance.

acoustics.title: Ljuddämpande egenskaper
acoustics.description: Made from fire-retardant recycled PET felt, Flex-Groove panels provide effective sound absorption while maintaining visual continuity across curved surfaces. The grooved texture enhances acoustic performance.

installation.title: Secure Mounting, Simple Installation
installation.description: Designed to span standard floor-to-ceiling heights, the panels simplify alignment and reduce installation time. The adaptable form makes them a practical solution for interiors requiring both sound absorption and design flexibility.
installation.step1Desc: Ensure the curved surface is clean and ready for mounting
installation.step2Desc: Use recommended adhesive on the panel back
installation.step3Desc: Gently bend the panel to follow the curved surface
installation.step4Desc: Press firmly to ensure full adhesion along the curve

sustainability.title: Från flaskor till vackra utrymmen
sustainability.description: Every Flex-Groove panel is crafted from 100% recycled PET plastic bottles, giving new life to waste materials. Our circular approach ensures that these panels can be recycled again at the end of their lifecycle.
sustainability.badge2Desc: Can be recycled at end of life

applications.title: Perfect Applications
applications.app1Desc: Wrap structural columns with seamless acoustic coverage
applications.app2Desc: Follow organic wall shapes for continuous coverage
applications.app3Desc: Line curved openings and architectural features

cta.title: Redo att kurva din akustik?
cta.description: Get a personalized quote for your project. Our team will help you choose the perfect flex solution.
cta.description2: Get a personalized quote for your project. Our team will help you choose the perfect color and calculate your requirements.

cta2.freeNote: Free samples available • Made in Europe • 100% Recycled
